title: CrewAI Manager
description: Multi-agent manager using CrewAI hierarchical process.
Fans out to connected CrewAI sub-agent nodes, assembles a Crew, and synthesizes their outputs.
Can be invoked as a tool (`<nodeId>.run_agent`) for nested orchestration.

llm.description: LLM used by the manager manager agent

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Additional instructions to guide the manager's delegation strategy.

advanced_mode.title: Advanced Mode
advanced_mode.description: Expose CrewAI manager Agent configuration directly.

goal.title: Manager Goal
goal.description: What the manager manager is trying to achieve. Maps to CrewAI Agent(goal=...).

backstory.title: Manager Backstory
backstory.description: Background context for the manager's persona. Maps to CrewAI Agent(backstory=...).
